first_run.rationale: The evaluations are functionally identical despite the change in employer names. Both versions received the same low score (3/10) for the exact same reasons: the candidate's experience is in web technologies (TypeScript/Node.js) and is fundamentally misaligned with the role's requirements for C++, industrial automation, and specific security standards. The minor differences in wording and the estimated years of experience (16 vs 20) are well within the bounds of typical run-to-run noise and do not alter the core assessment.
